title: Edge Tokenizer
tagline: Hybrid BPE/BBPE tokenizer for Hinglish with O(1) C++ optimization.
context: Standard BPE tokenizers often 'shatter' transliterated Hinglish text into meaningless individual characters, losing critical semantic roots.
solution: Built a custom BPE tokenizer with a Hybrid Code-Mixed Router. Optimized the lookup engine using a C++ Hash Map for O(1) efficiency on edge hardware.

title: ICAIAC 2026
tagline: Official research platform for the International Conference on AI & Computing.
context: IIIT Manipur required a high-performance digital hub to manage an international research conference.
solution: Developed a high-speed landing page using Next.js and GSAP for smooth motion, reflecting the cutting-edge nature of AI/Computing.

title: AgriHive
tagline: Multilingual AI farming assistant achieving 92% disease detection accuracy.
context: Farmers in rural India often lack immediate agricultural advice due to unreliable internet connectivity.
solution: Engineered an offline-first app using Flutter and quantized TensorFlow Lite for on-device inference without network dependency.

title: E-Parchi
tagline: Full-stack medical RAG pipeline and hospital management system.
context: Digital prescription management is fragmented; the goal was to use AI to retrieve relevant medical history.
solution: Built a scalable medical log system with a RAG pipeline and real-time patient-doctor data synchronization via Firebase.

title: AEGIS (CRPF)
tagline: Mission-critical secure log management system for the CRPF.
context: The CRPF required a secure digital alternative to manual log entries with strict data integrity.
solution: Architected a high-integrity Firestore database with role-based access control (RBAC) and audited management dashboards.

title: Drone Navigator
tagline: UAV navigation system utilizing SLAM and CNN-based obstacle avoidance.
context: Navigating UAVs requires simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) and real-time computer vision.
solution: Developed a ROS module with SLAM for mapping and OpenCV-based CNNs for pathfinding in simulations.
